EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.id} connected to the Oracle database instance {object.name} through {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} failed to connect to the Oracle database instance {object.name} through {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
User failed to connect to the Oracle database instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User connected to the Oracle database instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
